title: Disteira angulosa
taxonomy: Disteira angulosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. It is native to Australia, where it can be found growing in the wild. The classification of Disteira angulosa is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, the phylum Tracheophyta, the class Liliopsida, the order Asparagales, and the family Asphodelaceae. This species is further divided into the genus Disteira and the species Disteira angulosa. The classification of Disteira angulosa is still being studied and updated in modern botanical research.
